tweets: Heard someone say recently that Google doesn't care about FAQ schema anymore. My take, keep adding it. Two reasons below. #SEO #LocalSEO
Reason one. Don't drink the Google Kool Aid. Google has told us to go left a hundred times and then quietly turned right. Their public stance and what their algo actually rewards often disagree.

Reason two. Future proofing. If Google flips in a year or two and starts weighting FAQ schema again, you're staring at hundreds of URLs that need backfilling. Weeks of work to save a few minutes today.
Also, it's bigger than Google now. Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini, they all parse structured data. Schema isn't a Google thing anymore, it's an ecosystem thing.

Nobody really knows how the search ecosystem evolves from here. Betting that structured data stops mattering feels like the wrong side of history. Ship the schema. #SchemaMarkup #AISearch #buildinpublic #SaaS
